params.name: Atlantis Crystal
params.source: Lottery Machine No.2 (0.11%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.41%)
params.description:
On Dec 14, 1509 BC, the Stone of Atlantis was made to become the most important energy core of this legendary city.
Atlantis Crystals, as the central energy system of Atlantis, was once placed in its capital, the Sun Palace. Shaped like a huge transparent hexagonal prism, it absorbs sunlight and converts it into energy. It can also rejuvenate humans and regenerate their bodies, allowing the people of Atlantis to live a carefree life. But it exploded due to an inadvertent operation, shaking th …
